forest-h3.title: Thick Underbrush
text: Dense brambles crowd the path here, tugging at your clothes.
The forest feels tighter, more watchful.
A cluster of thorny bushes tangles together like a wall.
Something glints faintly between the roots.

bushes.text: Thorny and dense. You could push through but it would cost you.

roots.text: Thick roots knotted together. Something is wedged between them — too deep to reach.

glint.text: You reach for it. Your fingers brush something cold. But it's gone.

rock.roomText: A smooth rock sits among the roots, worn by water long dried up.
